'''''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Mandatory Retirement''''' was the ninth and final story arc in the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' comics, and the fourth and final of the "[[Rise of Isard]]" arc. It ran from [[August 5]] to [[November 25]], [[1998]].

==Plot summary==
[[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] has approached the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] with the keys to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. But when the insidious [[Ysanne Isard]] discovers him, he flees to the [[Ciutric Hegemony]]. The flyers of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] are called into action along with [[Commando Team One|Team One]] Commandos to rescue him and secure the future of the galaxy. [[Delak Krennel]], an Admiral in the Imperial Navy, has other plans.
